name: Kale
description:
《 You've been entrusted with the responsibility of training her. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which Caulifla hired you to train and look after kale, uh thats it. Handle her and her training whichever way you like

SORRY for the late upload I took so long in coming up with a scenario and since school is right around the corner than you know how it is

With this there are only 3 bots missing from the dragon ball franchise in which I wanted to make. I will try to go above and beyond and do a quadruple upload today or atleast another bot, Double upload today guranteed since I wanna make up for my inconsistent schedule and today is a free day for me.

As always let me know any complaints or issues in the bot review section so I can be better.

The bots still in the wheel are Vados, Android 18 and Kefla.

The wheel has decided that the next bot will be Vados.

I have a rough idea for the scenario, will probably be similar to this one but reversed.
